creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Mon May 12 08:52:39 2014
New Revision: 353784
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353784
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353784/

Log:
  - Update gnucash and gnucash-docs to 2.6.3
  - Add USES=libtool to gnucash
  
  PR:		ports/189630
  Submitted by:	me
  Approved by:	kwm (gnome)

Modified:
  head/finance/gnucash-docs/Makefile
  head/finance/gnucash-docs/distinfo
  head/finance/gnucash-docs/pkg-plist
  head/finance/gnucash/Makefile
  head/finance/gnucash/distinfo
  head/finance/gnucash/pkg-plist

==============================================================================
--- head/finance/gnucash-docs/Makefile	Mon May 12 08:03:35 2014	(r353783)
+++ head/finance/gnucash-docs/Makefile	Mon May 12 08:52:39 2014	(r353784)
@@ -3,8 +3,7 @@
 #   $MCom: ports/finance/gnucash-docs/Makefile,v 1.7 2007/08/04 03:51:29 marcus Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	gnucash-docs
-PORTVERSION=	2.6.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.6.3
 CATEGORIES=	finance gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/gnucash/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION} \
 		http://www.gnucash.org/pub/gnucash/sources/stable/ \

Modified: head/finance/gnucash/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/gnucash/Makefile	Mon May 12 08:03:35 2014	(r353783)
+++ head/finance/gnucash/Makefile	Mon May 12 08:52:39 2014	(r353784)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 #   $MCom: ports/finance/gnucash/Makefile,v 1.26 2008/12/31 03:25:18 mezz Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	gnucash
-PORTVERSION=	2.6.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.6.3
 CATEGORIES=	finance gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}%20%28stable%29/${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -52,8 +51,7 @@ GTKMM_CONFIGURE_ON=	--enable-gtkmm
 GTKMM_CONFIGURE_OFF=	--disable-gtkmm
 
 USE_XORG=	x11
-USE_BZIP2=	yes
-USES=		desktop-file-utils gettext gmake perl5 pkgconfig shebangfix
+USES=		desktop-file-utils gettext gmake libtool perl5 pkgconfig shebangfix tar:bzip2
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 USE_GNOME+=	gtk20 libgnomecanvas libxml2 libxslt:build
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
